name: Rudy's Cheese Omelettes a La Suds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs, beer and Tabasco sauce with a whisk until blended, not frothy.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in an 8-1/2-inch omelette pan over medium heat. The pan is hot enough when a drop of water spatters in it.
3. Pour one-third of the egg mixture into the pan and place your hand on the handle, palm down. Move the pan in a back-and-forth motion while stirring the egg mixture with a fork in a circular motion about seven times.
4. Sprinkle the omelette with a tablespoon of cheese.
5. To turn out the omelette, place your hand on the handle with palm upward and tip the pan to roll it onto a plate.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with the remaining egg mixture.
7. Serve with additional Tabasco sauce if desired.
